targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('15 minute', ts) AS time, avg((payload->>'intensity')::float) AS traffic, avg((payload->>'no2')::float) AS no2 FROM urbanpulse_history WHERE ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT extract(dow from ts) AS dow, extract(hour from ts) AS hour, avg((payload->>'no2')::float) AS avg_no2 FROM urbanpulse_history WHERE ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2
